why: Protocol 775 Configuration serverbound minecraft:client_information must dispatch from the official framed packet id to a packet body decoder through Stevenarella packet_by_id. This is packet-support evidence only and is separate from runtime client settings send behavior.
what: The Rust oracle test configuration_client_information_framed_dispatch_matches_official_oracle_answer panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::Serverbound, packet id 0, official body bytes) because v26_1_2.rs does not map Configuration serverbound packet id 0x00.

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: ClientInformation.createDefault(), ServerboundClientInformationPacket.STREAM_CODEC, ConfigurationProtocols.SERVERBOUND.codec().encode/decode(ServerboundClientInformationPacket), ConfigurationProtocols.SERVERBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), and ServerboundClientInformationPacket.information().
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Configuration serverbound client_information dispatch.
Current Protocol 775 Configuration serverbound mapping contains finish_configuration id 0x03, keep_alive id 0x04, and pong id 0x05, but not client_information id 0x00.
